title: CaseFix
description: If you're using an old or clunky case plugin, it's time to move to CaseFix. Built for modern Minecraft versions, it offers a smoother workflow, better performance, and features like schematic animations and per-case key systems.
body:
# **CaseFix** – The Complete Loot Box Plugin for Modern Minecraft Servers

**CaseFix** is a fully featured case (loot box) system designed for **Paper 1.21.4+**, offering an intuitive **visual editor** that lets you create, configure, and manage cases **entirely in-game** – no configuration files required. Built for ease of use and rich functionality, it’s the ideal upgrade for any server looking to enhance player engagement with a polished case system.

---

## ✅ **Key Advantages & Features**

### 🎨 **Visual Case Editor**
Build and customize cases through a clean, user-friendly GUI. No more manual YAML editing – everything is done with clicks.


### 🎬 **Multiple Opening Animations**
Choose from instant opening, NPC-based animations (using FancyNpcs), or even schematic-based builds (via WorldEdit/FAWE) for immersive case reveals.  
*(Suggestions for new animations? Contact the developer via Telegram: @fixsirt)*

### 💬 **Live Holograms**
Each case displays a dynamic hologram above it showing the player’s current key count, updated in real time and visible from a distance.

### 🌍 **Built-in Multi-Language Support**
Comes with 6 languages ready to use (English, Russian, German, French, Spanish, Polish) and easy to expand with custom translations.

### 🎁 **Smart Reward System**
Add rewards with customizable drop chances, optional command execution, and control over whether items are physically given or just visual.

### 🛡️ **Block Protection**
Case blocks are protected from being broken by players without permission, keeping your setup safe.

### 📂 **Clean Data Storage**
All cases, keys, and settings are stored in organized YAML files, making backups and manual edits straightforward when needed.

---

## 💬 **Main Commands**

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/casefix editor` | Open the visual case editor |
| `/casefix key give <player> <case> [amount]` | Give keys to a player |
| `/casefix key take <player> <case> [amount]` | Take keys from a player |
| `/casefix key set <player> <case> <amount>` | Set a player’s key count |
| `/casefix key check [player] <case>` | View keys for a case |
| `/casefix reload` | Reload plugin configuration and language files |

---

## 🛠️ **Developer & Support**

**Developer:** `fixsirt`  
**Contact for suggestions & new animation requests:** **Telegram @fixsirt**

---

Perfect for server administrators who want a **professional, easy-to-manage case system** that players will love. CaseFix combines **powerful features** with **simple administration**, making it the go-to choice for modern Minecraft servers.
